market_context: Risk-off tape on degraded data. fetch_data.py returned PARTIAL (exit 1): Alpaca prices/bars and Benzinga headlines OK for all 7 tickers, but yfinance fundamentals failed for every name -- fc.yahoo.com is blocked by the container egress policy (403), a standing policy denial, not retried/routed around. Account is flat: $100k equity, no positions, so the holdings-only breaking-news search did not apply (the 06-12 JNJ approval was never executed). Tape: a broad chip rout and tariff threats drove AAPL -5.7%, GOOGL -16.3%, MSFT -9.2%, NVDA -18.6% over 30 sessions; defensives JNJ +10.2% and UNH +7.1% led. VOO 669.99 (-2.6%); context headline 'Chip Rout Drags Nasdaq 100, Oil Sinks Below $69: Stock Market Today' (Benzinga). With no fundamentals and web verification scoped to absent holdings, no buy meets the two-source/0.7 bar. All signals HOLD.

signals.thesis: Stock-specific headwinds in a weak tape. Benzinga: Apple is buying Chinese memory chips amid a worsening AI-driven memory supply crunch (margin risk), and its top hardware chief left for OpenAI. Price 282.12, down ~5% over 30 sessions and 5d, no base. No fundamentals today (yahoo feed blocked) to gauge valuation. No edge to buy. Hold. Revisit on a memory-cost reversal or a close back above 300.
sources: Benzinga: Apple's Reported Push To Buy Chinese Memory Chips ... Surviving A Worsening AI-Driven Supply Crunch
Benzinga: Apple's Top Hardware Chief Leaves For OpenAI

signals.thesis: Falling knife with policy overhang. GOOGL 338.02, down 16.3% over the window. Benzinga: Trump threatens 100% tariffs that would 'supersede trade deals' for countries taxing US tech giants incl. Alphabet, and Google is limiting Meta's Gemini access amid demand. Tariff/regulatory risk unresolved; fundamentals unavailable today. No catalyst to step in front of the decline. Hold. Reconsider on tariff de-escalation or a base above 360.
sources: Benzinga: Trump Threatens 100% Tariffs That Would 'Supersede Trade Deals' For Countries Taxing American Tech Giants Like Meta, Amazon And Alphabet
Benzinga: Google Limits Meta's Access To Gemini AI Models Amid Rising Demand

signals.thesis: Real catalysts but not chasing. Benzinga: TECVAYLI received a positive CHMP opinion (R/R multiple myeloma) and JNJ presented IMAAVY data across 12 abstracts at EAN 2026. Defensive name. But JNJ 254.36 is already +10% in 5 sessions, sources are single-outlet, and no fundamentals are available to check valuation. The 06-12 $162.50 approval was never executed. Hold pending a pullback toward 240 or second-source confirmation. Falsified if catalysts reverse or close < 235.
sources: Benzinga: Johnson & Johnson's TECVAYLI Receives CHMP Approval Recommendation To Treat Relapsed Or Refractory Multiple Myeloma
Benzinga: Johnson & Johnson Announces Additional Data On IMAAVY ... At European Academy Of Neurology 2026 Congress

signals.thesis: Contrarian narrative only. Benzinga notes MSFT is down 23% in 2026 with a strategist calling the selloff overdone ('significantly overselling'). Price 371.94, down 9.2% over the window but +1.2% over 5d (tentative stabilization). No confirmed company catalyst; fundamentals unavailable today. An 'oversold' opinion is not a falsifiable buy thesis. Hold; revisit on a confirmed catalyst or a base above 380.
sources: Benzinga: MSFT Is Down 23% In 2026: Why This Strategist Says Investors Are 'Significantly Overselling' The Stock

signals.thesis: Avoid the falling knife. NVDA 191.88, down 18.6% over the window and 8% over 5d amid a broad chip rout (Benzinga: 'Chip Bloodbath Hits Nasdaq 100 As South Korea Plunges'). Grantham warns of a 'brutal tech stock reversal' and short interest is rising. The Palantir-Nvidia government partnership is a minor positive, not a stabilizer. Negative momentum, no fundamentals to anchor value. Hold. Reconsider only after the chip selloff bases.
sources: Benzinga: Will Nvidia Follow Amazon's Dot-Com Path? Jeremy Grantham Warns Of Brutal Tech Stock Reversal
Benzinga: Palantir Partners With Nvidia To Develop An Intelligent Engine ... For U.S. Government Agencies

signals.thesis: No hard catalyst to act on. UNH 427.44, up 7.1% over the window and 5.1% over 5d, but its only headlines are price-target chatter (B of A Buy, PT raised to $475) and a filler 'if you invested $100 15 years ago' piece -- both excluded as non-falsifiable per routine rules. Momentum is positive but unsupported by actionable news; fundamentals unavailable. Hold; need a real operational or regulatory catalyst before buying strength.
